title: The Silent Gear Anvil
description:
This is the big one. The §lSilent Gear Anvil§r is your gateway to iron tools and beyond.

Unlike Overgeared's simple stone anvil, this requires serious infrastructure:
• Its recipe is §lexpensive§r — think vanilla anvil levels of material cost
• It requires a §lCreate Mechanical Press§r to assemble
• You'll need to set up basic Create automation to power the press

Once you have this anvil, you can craft §lSilent Gear§r tools — a modular gear system that lets you combine materials for custom properties.

This is the moment you transition from §lmanual crafting§r (Overgeared) to §lindustrial fabrication§r (Silent Gear + Create).
